metadata.name: barnii77-barg
metadata.summary: Barni's tiny parser generator for parsing strings/code

modules.name: barg.barg_codegen_builtins
documentation: NOTE: this code will be C-header-style inserted into the generated parsers. "Unused" imports aren't actually unused.

functions.name: barg.barg_codegen_builtins._builtin_take_
documentation: NOTE: '|Any ' in field so it can be called in non-type-safe way from other places

classes.name: barg.barg_codegen_builtins._InternalError_
documentation: It is strongly recommended to pass `None` as the value for parameter `line`.

classes.name: barg.barg_codegen.CodeGenerator
documentation: Abstract codegen backend for different codegen targets

classes.name: barg.barg_codegen.PyCGInternalGenSymbol
documentation: A class representing module level functions or classes (global symbols) generated as part of the parser that are internal (ie. not *directly* exposed)

classes.name: barg.barg_codegen.PythonCodeGenerator

methods.name: barg.barg_codegen.PythonCodeGenerator.codegen
documentation:
The codegen method generates the python parser.
Args:
    head: code to be inserted after the imports that contains transform definitions etc

functions.name: barg.barg_exec_builtins.builtin_take
documentation: NOTE: '|Any ' in field so it can be called in non-type-safe way from other places

functions.name: barg.__main__.map_call_stack_to_local_selfs
documentation: Captures the call stack and extracts self from all frames (locals) where it can

functions.name: barg.__main__.mark_line_in_grammar
documentation: a function that takes grammar[line-4:line+5], indents it all and puts an arrow before grammar[line]

functions.name: barg.barg_core.generate_python_parser
documentation:
Generate python code from the given grammar and return it in a string.
Args:
    grammar: the barg grammar
    error_out: a list where recoverable grammar errors will be written out to as strings.
    head: optional string to be inserted at the top of the generated parser. should contain builtins and imports. if None, then a very minimalistic default will be used.

classes.name: barg.barg_core.BadGrammarError
documentation: It is strongly recommended to pass `None` as the value for parameter `line`.

classes.name: barg.barg_core.InternalError
documentation: It is strongly recommended to pass `None` as the value for parameter `line`.
